title: Mini-game features
description: Create and improve your mini-games by adding a special feature to them!
body:
# Main
Imagine you are creating a mini-game in minecraft, but you are faced with the problem of a lack of interesting things. You've seen some interesting items in a big fashion, but you don't want to add it because of the huge number of useless items. Then it will be more convenient to download Mini-game features and get all the interesting items without adding unnecessary ones!
## Description of the items
**Poisoned dagger** is a fast weapon that also poisons the enemy

**Dazer** drops an object from the opponent's second hand

**Battle hammer** forces you to reload an object in the opponent's second hand

**Daze bomb** drops objects in the opponents' second hand within the blast radius

**Shield breaker** forces you to reload items in the second hand of opponents within the explosion radius

**Radar** highlights all nearby entities except you and goes to recharge

**Shell** will enhance your security when you sneak around, but you won't be able to walk.

You can throw a **mine** that will explode without destroying the blocks, but it will cause huge damage. The minus can be neutralized with **wire cutters**
